Title: CS Open Day FAQ
Question system thought: What is the difference between Computer Science and Computer Science and Artificial Intelligence?
Answer given: In the first two years, students on both programmes study the same core modules and cover the same fundamental computer science topics. Later, students on Computer Science and Artificial Intelligence take certain AI modules as compulsory and their final year project must include an AI element. Students on Computer Science have more flexibility: they can still choose AI modules and complete an AI-related project, but it is optional rather than compulsory.
